vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to harmonic drive heat dissipation.
risk.mit: Implement a cooling fan and thermal management strategy.

risk.desc: Cable routing through the center bore may cause strain on harnesses.
risk.mit: Ensure adequate strain relief and routing clearance.

risk.desc: Bearing seat may not have sufficient preload.
risk.mit: Verify preload intent and ensure visible locking evidence.

risk.desc: Retaining feature may not be robust enough for cyclic loading.
risk.mit: Review and reinforce retaining feature design.

risk.desc: Mounting flanges may not have sufficient clearance.
risk.mit: Ensure clearance fits are named with standard intent.

physics_paths.path_description: Torque from payload and arm links is transmitted through the harmonic drive to the shoulder joint.
Cable routing through the center bore of the joint.
Heat dissipation from the harmonic drive to the surrounding air.
Shoulder joint rotation around the pitch axis.

Mounting point for a cooling fan to assist in thermal management.

manufacturing_strategy.support: Vertical orientation for LPBF, horizontal for CNC
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: CMM for dimensional accuracy, NDT for material integrity

verification_focus.description: Cable routing and strain relief verification.

risk.desc: The fastener locking mechanism may not be robust enough for the high cycle count.
risk.mit: Conduct fatigue testing on the fastener locking mechanism to ensure durability.

risk.desc: The pneumatic locking system may not be fully sealed, leading to potential leaks.
risk.mit: Implement a double-seal design for the pneumatic locking system to ensure full sealing.

risk.desc: The service access panel may not provide sufficient clearance for maintenance.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the service access panel to ensure adequate clearance for maintenance.

risk.desc: The utility ports may not be able to withstand the operating pressures.
risk.mit: Conduct pressure testing on the utility ports to ensure they can withstand the operating pressures.

risk.desc: The mounting flange may not be able to handle the payload torque.
risk.mit: Conduct torque testing on the mounting flange to ensure it can handle the payload torque.
